_meta.source: College Sports Commission (CSC) — disclosure form template excerpts
_meta.license: Public information, attestation-template excerpts reproduced under fair use for tooling design.
_meta.attribution: Excerpts of compliance-attestation phrasing and disclosure template structure derived from the College Sports Commission public template.
_meta.caveat: Proslync is not a CSC submitter. Template phrasing is reproduced as design reference only; consult counsel before adapting for production attestation.

attestationPhrasing.athleteSelfDisclosure: I attest under penalty of perjury that the information disclosed in this packet is true and complete to the best of my knowledge, and that no material consideration has been omitted.
attestationPhrasing.agentDisclosure: I confirm that the compensation and service-provider rows accurately reflect the engagement terms between the athlete and the represented brand or payor.
attestationPhrasing.schoolReceipt: The institution acknowledges receipt of the above disclosure and has performed the three-track review (NCAA / school / ethics) per the institutional NIL policy.

valueBandPatterns.typicalScope: Single-event appearance, social-post pack, local-market activation
Multi-month creator-package, regional ambassador, content series
Multi-year exclusive, signature-line collab, flagship campaign

thresholdGuidance.note: Thresholds reflect commonly-discussed CSC working numbers; verify the institutional policy for the operative cutoff.
